summary: Backend-only testing of the new price_approval_superseded notification side-effect on POST /api/price-approvals/{id}/approve. Extended coverage with a new test file (7 new tests) plus regression against the existing supersede test file (13 tests). 28 passed / 1 skipped / 0 failed (the skip is legitimate — the 'no prior approved' scenario is skipped when the tuple already has approved standing rows from prior test iterations).
critical_code_review_comments: notification_service.create_notification dedupe is based on (type, ref) with read=False only. If a sales user marks the notification as read, a subsequent supersede on the SAME old_approval_id would produce a duplicate row. In practice this cannot happen because once a rule is superseded its status is no longer 'approved' and the sup_filter in approve_price_approval won't pick it up again — but the dedupe layer alone is not idempotent. Not a bug (defense in depth exists via status filter), but worth noting.

price_approvals.approve_price_approval fetches superseded_docs BEFORE update_many. If concurrent approvals for the same tuple race (very unlikely: only admins can approve), duplicate notifications could be emitted for the same old_id. Acceptable given low concurrency of approvals; noting for completeness.

notification body uses '{:,.0f}' → integer thousands separator. Assertion 'Rp 12,345' matches actual body 'Rp 12,345/meter'. Body includes approver name, both prices, arrow (↓↑→) and Δ%. All spec fields present.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@kainnusantara.id / demo12345; Sales: sales@kainnusantara.id / demo12345 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md)
seed_data_creation: TEST_-prefixed price-approvals created dynamically per test using existing seeded customers/products. Notifications are created as side-effect of approve. No teardown implemented — subsequent iterations may see cumulative notifications; tests are written idempotently to tolerate this via ref-based lookup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature: price_approval_superseded notification on approve endpoint is verified end-to-end. Notification fields validated: id (ntf_*), type='price_approval_superseded', title starts with 'Aturan harga Anda diganti', body contains approver name + old/new Rupiah prices + Δ% + arrow, severity='warning', link='price-approvals', recipient_role='sales', recipient_user=<owner_id>, action_type='price_approval_view', action_id=<new_approval_id>, ref='pra_superseded:<old_approval_id>', read=false. Dedupe verified indirectly (status transitions prevent re-supersede of same old_id). Reject and order-scope approve verified to NOT create notification. If main agent modifies notification body format or field names, this test suite will catch regressions. To rerun: `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_price_approval_supersede_notification.py -v`.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Feature works as specified in the review request.
